titles.title: Department of Defense Appropriations Act, 2027
Department of Defense Appropriations Act, 2027
Department of Defense Appropriations Act, 2027
Making appropriations for the Department of Defense for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2027, and for other purposes.

action.text: The House Committee on Appropriations reported an original measure, H. Rept. 119-715, by Mr. Calvert.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 621.
